login.brandTagline: Global services tailored for the Vietnamese community
login.demoEntryA11y: Explore the demo without an account
login.subtitle: Enter your phone number to continue. OTP is for demo.
login.register_toast: Registration is coming soon. Please continue with phone login.

vietnamHub.heroSubtitle: Premium stays, tours, and vetted locals — built for inbound travelers and returning expats.
vietnamHub.errorLoad: We could not load the hub. Check your connection and API configuration.
vietnamHub.empty: Listings coming soon — ask Leona to arrange manually.

sos.fabHint: Opens the AI Shield and emergency options for Vietnam.
sos.subtitle: Stay calm. Help is available.
sos.gpsShareDetail: Your exact GPS location is being shared with VIONA’s safety response team to help protect you.
sos.gpsUnavailable: Location permission is off or unavailable. Emergency numbers and help still work.
sos.coordsA11y: Coordinates secured for your safety report.
sos.medicalSub: Call 115 — AI voice assist on next screen
sos.policeSub: Call 113 — AI interpreter on next screen
sos.reportQueuedBody: Your location and reference have been sent to VIONA’s safety response queue.
sos.fabHoldHint: Press and hold for three seconds to open the emergency shield.
sos.triageBufferBody: Complete the AI safety check first. Emergency dial unlocks in {{seconds}}s.

catalog.title: Catalog manager
catalog.hint: Turn on so tourists see EN/KR/JP blurbs from your Vietnamese draft — one tap per item coming soon.
catalog.addItem: Add room, service, or menu row

rankingBanner.softNudgeBody: You have {{daysLeft}} days of Premium Ranking left. Your business grew by {{growth}}% this month with VIONA.
rankingBanner.criticalBody: WARNING: Your Top 1 ranking will drop in {{daysLeft}} days. Upgrade to the SaaS Elite plan or top up VIO Credits to keep visibility.
rankingBanner.lockedBody: Ranking dropped. Top up VIO Credits now!

vietqr.title: Local VietQR (VND)
vietqr.subtitle: Guests can scan with Vietnamese banking apps — no card fees. Set bank BIN + account on your business profile.
vietqr.error: Could not load VietQR. Check bank fields (6-digit BIN + account) and API.

tourism.heroSubtitle: Premium stays, tours, and vetted locals — built for inbound travelers and returning expats.
tourism.errorLoad: We could not load the hub. Check your connection and API configuration.
tourism.empty: Listings coming soon — ask Leona to arrange manually.
tourism.checkoutDemo: Book featured stay · pay in VIO Credits

checkout.title: Pay with VIO Credits
checkout.vndCashHint: Cash / local bank apps (indicative): ≈ {{vnd}} VND at live FX — final lock applies when you pay.
checkout.quoteLegal: Amounts are computed on VIONA servers. Your wallet will be debited the total shown.
checkout.configError: API is not configured. Set EXPO_PUBLIC_REST_API_BASE.
checkout.topUpBody: Top up VIO Credits to complete this booking. Your quote stays valid—return here after topping up.
checkout.confirmedSub: You’re secured. The merchant sees this booking on their Live Order Radar instantly.

home.profileRoleGateTitle: Upgrade your account to earn VIO Credits
home.profileRoleGateBrokerBody: Field brokers earn VIO Credits when tourists book through your merchants. Your wallet updates automatically — no extra apps.
home.profileRoleGateMerchantBody: Merchants earn VIO Credits on inbound tourism bookings. Connect your shop, manage your menu, and get paid in one wallet.
home.charityBody: Every transaction helps bring meals and classes to children in need in Vietnam.
home.heroSubExpat: VIONA connects life, business, travel, and AI support for the Vietnamese diaspora worldwide.
home.heroSubTourist: One VIONA entry point for wallet, live interpreter, and trusted travel support in Vietnam.
home.survivalSub: Tap for quick help while traveling — highlighted in travel mode.
home.sosLocatingDetail: Locating your area for accurate help…
home.sosPingCta: Share location with nearby VIONA community
home.sosPingAlertBody: SOS ping sent with coordinates {{coords}} ({{city}}). Pilot flow — not a substitute for authorities.

travelHub.fastTrackAlertBody: Priority check-in and fast lane at partner airports (demo).
travelHub.taxRefundAlertBody: Upload receipts and track shopping tax refunds (demo).
travelHub.vaultAlertBody: Encrypted profile storage for passports and travel documents (demo).
travelHub.telehealthAlertBody: Connect to remote clinicians when traveling (demo; not emergency care).
travelHub.esimAlertBody: International eSIM channel in beta — activate data by destination (demo).
travelHub.destinationHelper: Services change based on your country of residence.
travelHub.mapBadgePlaceholderLine1: Based on your location or destination
travelHub.mapBadgePlaceholderLine2: Services vary by country of residence

localHub.heroSub: Beauty & spa · Dining · Business booking — fast local access, VIONA standard.
localHub.vnBannerSub: Stays · Tours · On-ground help — demo cues

b2bPaywallUi.subThreat: Your trial window is ending soon. You can upgrade to keep automation features (demo).
b2bPaywallUi.chooseLane: Choose a plan for your business
b2bPaywallUi.trapPendingSync: Syncing merchant profile dates from VIONA for the 90-day cycle — refresh your business account.
b2bPaywallUi.trapGate: After day {{cap}}: Priority placement ended — VIO Credits restore featured placement and AI reception.
b2bPaywallUi.trapEnforcementVio: Featured placement paused until VIO Credits top-up.
b2bPaywallUi.metricCopy: Demo display: {{amount}} in bookings processed on the platform. Upgrade when you want to keep automation.
b2bPaywallUi.tier1Body: Metered voice, SMS, and booking events. Best when volume shifts — top up VIO Credits and scale down anytime (demo).
b2bPaywallUi.tier2Sub: Full-stack automation, data tooling, and VIP retention (demo).
b2bPaywallUi.tier2Feat2: VIP profiles, history, and retention signals
b2bPaywallUi.cancelBody: Cancel anytime. Access continues through your paid period — no extra retention steps.
b2bPaywallUi.cancelA11y: Cancel SaaS Elite subscription at end of billing period
b2bPaywallUi.tier3Body: B2B wholesale volume — lowest headline take for merchants on VIONA’s verified trade lane (qualifying SKUs; see merchant ops team).
b2bPaywallUi.tier3Hint: Stack with Tier 1 or 2 for AI + voice
b2bPaywallUi.legalHint: Renews monthly until cancelled. Taxes may apply. VIONA B2B terms apply.
b2bPaywallUi.alertCancelNoMerchant: Missing merchant id — sign in again or sync your profile.

disclaimers.defaultLite: AI supports intake and draft requests. Merchant confirmation is required. No legal, medical, or financial final advice. No payment or booking finalization in this demo path.
disclaimers.aestheticsConsultationOnly: Consultation scheduling only. No treatment advice, no medical outcomes, and no procedure booking as final via AI without human approval.
disclaimers.retailLead: Lead and pickup scheduling only. Inventory and pricing changes are not performed by AI in this phase.
disclaimers.stayTravelLeadOrConfirm: Availability and lead capture only unless merchant policy explicitly allows confirmed holds. No payment capture via AI here.
disclaimers.homeServicesEstimate: Site visit / estimate scheduling only. No guaranteed quotes or structural sign-off via AI.
disclaimers.professionalSchedulingOnly: Scheduling and intake only. No legal, tax, immigration, or insurance advice as a final professional opinion.
disclaimers.educationScheduling: Class or enrollment scheduling intake only. No guarantee of placement or certification via AI.
disclaimers.healthSchedulingOnly: Appointment scheduling intake only. No symptom diagnosis, triage as medical advice, prescriptions, or emergency handling via AI.

_generic.transcriptCustomer: Hello, I would like to ask about {{service}} and available times.
_generic.transcriptAi: Thanks — I captured a draft request for the merchant team. This is a local simulator only.
_generic.transcriptConfirm: Nothing is finalized until the merchant confirms in their workflow.
_generic.transcriptFallback: If the slot is busy, staff can propose alternatives during review.
_generic.aiDraftResponse: Draft intake prepared — pending merchant confirmation (simulator).

setup.industrySectionBody: Select the vertical that best matches your business. This choice is stored on this device for this session only — it is not sent to VIONA servers until you submit a pilot request with consent.
setup.industryNoneBody: Pick an industry to see the intake playbook and safety disclaimer for Lễ Tân AI.

demo.selectIndustryPrompt: Select an industry so Lễ Tân AI understands your context.
